data.title: PurpleRidge launches Automated AWS Account Audit to combat 8-minute AI cloud attacks. Platform reveals Combined Risk Stories.
data.description: Located in Santa Clara, California, PurpleRidge, utilizing RidgeBot® from Ridge Security, has introduced the Automated AWS Account Audit. This new offering addresses security concerns revealed by recent studies indicating that malicious actors can infiltrate a cloud system in as little as eight minutes. With the rise of LLMs being utilized by hackers to search for vulnerable credentials in public S3 buckets, PurpleRidge's solution goes beyond traditional checklists by identifying "Combined Risk Stories." By pinpointing isolated vulnerabilities, the platform aims to strengthen security measures in response to evolving threats in the digital landscape.

data.title: Tolion Health AI forms advisory board with experts in Alzheimer's, brain health, AI to enhance scientific capabilities.
data.description: Tolion Health AI, a digital health company specializing in personalized AI solutions for brain health and longevity, has established its Scientific Advisory Board (SAB) based in Boston. The board comprises leading experts in neuroscience, neurology, Alzheimer’s disease research, preventive medicine, and AI. This move aims to enhance Tolion's scientific prowess and provide guidance for its future endeavors. The SAB's formation underscores Tolion's commitment to advancing innovative solutions in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Monroe Capital funds acquisition of Excel Testing by Fusion Capital. Excel offers testing programs since 2002.
data.description: In Chicago, Monroe Capital LLC facilitated a senior credit facility to aid in the acquisition of Excel Testing and Engineering Holdings LLC by Fusion Capital Partners. The financing was part of a joint lead arrangement by Monroe. Excel, established in 2002, provides various testing services such as emissions, battery, durability, and specialty testing throughout the entire product lifespan. These services include pre-production validation and compliance during product usage. Fusion Capital Partners, a private equity sponsor, led the acquisition.

data.title: Leidos had a strong Q4 and FY2025: Revenues $4.2B Q4, $17.2B FY2025; Diluted EPS $2.53 Q4, $11.14 FY2025; Cash flow $1.8B FY2025.
data.description: Leidos Holdings Inc. reported financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2025, with revenues of $4.2 billion for Q4, down 4% YoY, and $17.2 billion for the year, up 3% YoY. Diluted EPS was $2.53 for Q4, up 19% YoY, and $11.14 for the year, up 21% YoY. Non-GAAP diluted EPS was $2.76 for Q4, up 16% YoY, and $11.99 for the year, up 17% YoY. Cash Flows from Operations were $495 million for Q4 and $1.8 billion for the year. Net Bookings were $5.6 billion for Q4 and $17.5 billion for the year, with a backlog of $49.0 billion. Leidos entered into an agreement to acquire Entrust for $2.4 billion. Forward guidance for FY26 includes revenues of $17.5 - $17.9 billion and non-GAAP diluted EPS of $12.05 - $12.45. The company declared a cash dividend of $0.43 per share and saw improved free cash flow and net income margins compared to the previous fiscal year.

data.title: Black Rifle Coffee Company will release Q4 and FY 2025 financial results on March 2, 2026, with a conference call on March 3 at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Black Rifle, a Veteran-founded premium beverage company trading as BRCC on NYSE, will reveal its Q4 and FY 2025 financial outcomes on March 2, 2026, post-market closure. On March 3, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET, the Company will conduct a conference call to analyze the results. The call can be accessed through a webcast on the Company’s investor relations site.

data.title: Steak ‘n Shake sees significant sales boost after launching Bitcoin payment option, $15M in reserves.
data.description: A popular American restaurant chain, Steak ‘n Shake, reported significant growth in same-store sales due to its innovative nine-month burger-to-Bitcoin strategy. The company has amassed a notable $15 million Bitcoin reserve as a result of this initiative. This strategy has led to a substantial boost in sales for the restaurant chain.

data.title: Allegion (NYSE: ALLE) reports Q4, full-year 2025 financial results with high-single digit revenue growth. CEO optimistic for 2026.
data.description: Dublin - Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a top global security products and solutions provider, announced their financial performance for Q4 ending on Dec. 31, 2025. Allegion President and CEO John H. Stone expressed pride in the team for meeting commitments to customers and shareholders. The year 2025 saw substantial growth with high-single digit enterprise revenue and successful capital deployment, along with robust cash generation. Looking ahead to 2026, Allegion aims to continue this positive momentum.

data.title: IDEAYA Biosciences reported $1.05 billion cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities on Dec 31, 2025, and ongoing clinical trials progress with its oncology products.
data.description: IDEAYA Biosciences, a precision medicine oncology company, provided an update on its Phase 2/3 OptimUM-02 trial for darovasertib and crizotinib in metastatic uveal melanoma. They confirmed the need for 130 PFS events for topline results, expected by late March. The company has about $1.05 billion in cash as of Dec 31, 2025, to last until 2030. IDEAYA is also expecting to initiate a study for IDE849 in SCLC and NEC by 2026 and plans for Phase 3 trials for darovasertib in uveal melanoma by H1 '26. Additionally, IDEAYA announced various upcoming milestones and financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: U.S. Commerce Department lifts duties on Chinese graphite to ~220%; ITC decision may lock in 5+ years, due March 2026.
data.description: The DOC's recent final ruling has resulted in the elimination of duties on Chinese graphite anode material, with the rates previously at approximately 220%. The ITC is expected to make an injury decision by March 2026, potentially solidifying this change for the next five years or more.
